calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-21-2014 Dismissal - No Appearance

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-14-2014 Continued To Apr-21-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jeffrey Chen, Esq for Plaintiff Kyung Sik Choi.
Kavita Sharma, Esq for Defendant Mary Kwan in Limited Scope.

9:15 am
Court speaks with both parties in Chambers.

9:30 am
The Court orders the following:
1) The Court conitnues the matter to 04/28/14 at 9:00 am for Trial.
2) Ms. Sharma is to advise Ms. Gold to have permanent counsel for Defendant.
3) On 04/22/14, Plaintiff's counsel is to discuss options for alternative housing with Defendant and her permanent Counsel.
Both sides waive notice. Defendant is ordered present on 04/28/14 at 9:00 am.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

CONTINUANCE CALENDAR FOR UD JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-03-2014 Continued To Apr-14-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-01-2014 Continued To Apr-03-14 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 501

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT Tom Lalanne; Clerk M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Kyung Sik Choi is present.
Attorney Jeffrey A. Chen for the plaintiff.
Defendant Mary Kwan DID NOT PRESENT.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of April 1, 2014 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
